use std::path::Path;

fn main() {
    println!("cargo:rerun-if-changed=src/proto/definitions.proto");
    println!("cargo:rerun-if-env-changed=PROTO_DIR");

    let proto_dir = std::env::var("PROTO_DIR").unwrap_or_else(|_| "src/proto".into());
    let proto_path = Path::new(&proto_dir).join("definitions.proto");
    let contents = std::fs::read_to_string(&proto_path)
        .expect("proto file not found; run `make fetch-protos` first");
    let code = generate_rust_code(&contents);
    let out_dir = std::env::var("OUT_DIR").unwrap();
    std::fs::write(format!("{out_dir}/proto.rs"), code).unwrap();
}

fn generate_rust_code(_proto: &str) -> String {
    "// generated from local proto file".into()
}
